forest.description: You are in a dark forest. Paths lead north and east.

town.description: An abandoned town square. A broken clock tower looms overhead.

dark_alley.description: The alley feels wrong. Shadows cling to the walls.

river.description: A quiet river. You see something shining nearby.

library.description: Dusty shelves. Books whisper when you walk past.

basement.description: It smells like damp stone. Something breathes below.
